home.name: Enzo Saso
home.description: With 5+ years of experience shipping production-grade web products, owning decisions from architecture to measurable business impact. Specialized in JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Next.js, with a strong bias toward clarity, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Senior Software Developer with expertise in React.js to Next.js migrations, microfrontend architecture refactoring, and production incident response. Strong focus on code quality standards, technical debt reduction, and cross-team collaboration. Experience in AI-powered feature implementation and complex business logic systems.
about.personalDescription: Product-minded engineer who challenges assumptions, uncovers real constraints, and delivers solutions that move meaningful metrics. AI works under my standards: it generates code aligned with my conventions, architectural principles, and quality bar. Strong bias toward clarity, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

services.name: Solid and scalable projects
services.description: As a Frontend developer, I have the ability to design and develop solid and scalable frontend software architectures. I always consider aspects like security, performance, and maintainability to ensure the project is robust and scalable in the long term.

services.name: Clean, structured, and maintainable code
services.description: I'm responsible for writing clean, structured, and maintainable code in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I always ensure to follow coding best practices and industry standards. Additionally, I regularly test and debug my work to ensure it's functional and meets project requirements.

services.name: Leading a team of developers
services.description: I have experience leading teams. As a leader, I delegate tasks and ensure deadlines are met and work is delivered on time. Additionally, I provide guidance and support to my team, and ensure they have the necessary resources and tools to perform their work effectively.

services.name: Collaboration with designers and other developers
services.description: Working collaboratively with designers and other developers is crucial to ensure the project's user interface is intuitive and effectively designed to guarantee a positive user experience. As a Frontend developer, I have the ability to work in a team, communicate my ideas, and collaborate effectively to achieve project goals.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm ready to bring my experience and skills to your team. Shall we start?

data.title: Acordeavos
description: I had the opportunity to lead the development of a complete eCommerce from scratch for a client who required complex and customized functionalities. For this project, we used advanced technologies like Next.js for the online store, React.js for the admin panel, Redux for state management, GraphQL and Apollo for communication with the Firebase database.

The project objective was to create an ecommerce that offered a fluid and personalized shopping experience for users, with advanced features like bulk edition, invoice upload that updates stock, customized customer contact options, reports, product page with variants and role-based pricing, shopping cart with discount coupons, customized payment methods, and many other features.

As the main developer, I worked to carry out the project. We used Next.js for building the online store, React.js for the admin panel, Redux for state management, and GraphQL and Apollo for communication with the Firebase database.
Later we implemented Harness Engineering to generate a continuous development flow in which only AI is capable of generating code meeting quality standards.
data.stack: NextJS, ReactJS, GraphQL, Apollo, Redux, NodeJS, Firebase

data.title: ShopYA - Marketplace SaaS
description: Marketplace platform for small entrepreneurs in Argentina with subscription model.
**Architecture & Development:**
• Designed and developed complete system architecture (Next.js + NestJS + Firestore)
• Implemented SaaS business model with subscription plans
• Created multi-store system with product, order management and integrated messaging
**Implemented Features:**
• Multi-vendor marketplace with automated approval process
• Recurring subscription system and plan limit management
• Integration with shipping providers (Andreani, OCA) and flexible configuration
• Direct customer-vendor communication via platform-native messaging
• Analytics dashboard for sellers with real-time sales metrics
**Impact:**
• Scalable platform supporting multiple stores without sales commissions
• SaaS model generating predictable recurring revenue
• Enabled hundreds of entrepreneurs to digitize their businesses with low entry cost
**Technologies:** Next.js, NestJS, Firestore, TypeScript, Microservices Architecture

data.title: Metro Cuadrado
description: Website generator of budgets through downloadable PDFs, with data persistence in local storage and in db through users.
For the site development, we used Next.js. We also integrated Mercado Pago API for charging recurring subscriptions.
This application was 100% vibe coded, has more than 1000 active users and 6 months after its launch, no critical bugs reported, only improvements.

data.title: NyG Car Detailing
description: Website with landing page for vehicle detailing workshop which allows users to schedule appointments and the business owner to have a dashboard with important information as well as possibility to configure schedules and view scheduled appointments with multiple views and possibility to perform actions.
